title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・先を行く者よ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna win! This is my chance to—)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Who do ya think you're racin' against?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna become da best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is out in front! She's running away
with the lead! Aaaand she crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm da best in all Japan!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Man, oh man... I know I lost, but for some reason,
I'm itchin' to go again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(How could I not be, seein' that incredible
victory?!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait, Tama. I'm gonna beat you
someday!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. You and Oguri look like you're already
plottin' your revenge.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My journey's not finished yet. Go ahead and try
to keep up with me... if ya can!
